# Release assets

## Proposed (or provided via GitHub Releases)

| Bundle | Contents |
|--------|----------|
| `app_logos.zip` | All service logo `.webp` files |
| `country_flags.zip` | All country flag `.webp` files |
| `assets-full.zip` | Both folders combined |

## Checksums

SHA-256 checksums are provided alongside each release for verification.
